title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: DeepSeek V4 is an LLM featuring a 1M token context window and hybrid attention mechanisms including CSA, sparse selection, HCA, and sliding window attention for efficiency. The model incorporates anticipatory routing and achieves state-of-the-art results with novel training and infrastructure optimizations.
